_comment: Phase-3 deterministic ground-conflict fixture around LSZH. User is taxiing north at 10 kts. Target A crosses ahead from west to east (triggers taxi_hold_position). Target B sits parked on the apron well off-axis (must NOT trigger). Loader recomputes derived geometry; phase is set by the classifier from alt_agl + dynamics.

targets._comment: Target A: ~100 m ahead, ~20 m west of user, moving east at 15 kts. alt_msl matches field elevation -> alt_agl ~0 ft, gs in Taxi band -> phase=Taxi.
Target B: 500 m east of user, stationary on the apron. phase=OnGround (gs < 5). Out of ground-conflict range AND wrong phase, so the advisor must skip it entirely.
